# `get_endpoint_schema`

**Get Endpoint Schema**

- **Source:** `courtlistener/mcp/tools/get_endpoint_schema_tool.py`
- **Estimated definition size:** ~352 tokens (description ~43, input schema ~236; cl100k_base)
- **Parameters:** 1 (1 required)
- **Raw input schema:** [`get_endpoint_schema.inputs.json`](./get_endpoint_schema.inputs.json)

## Description

Get the schema for a CourtListener API endpoint.

Use this for additional API endpoints which do not have a
dedicated MCP tool. These endpoints are distinct from the
search endpoint and often include more detailed metadata.

## Annotations

| Annotation | Value |
|---|---|
| `title` | `"Get Endpoint Schema"` |
| `readOnlyHint` | `true` |
| `destructiveHint` | `false` |
| `openWorldHint` | `false` |
